title: Modern Lekki Duplex
description: A stunning, fully automated contemporary duplex featuring premium finishing and open-concept architecture.

title: Urban Executive Penthouse
description: Panoramic city views with wrap-around balconies and state-of-the-art integrated kitchen facilities.

title: Lakeside Family Bungalow
description: A serene waterfront bungalow with lush garden, private jetty, and spacious entertainment patio.

title: Smart Terrace Townhouse
description: A sleek multi-level townhouse with smart home integration, rooftop terrace, and private parking bay.

title: Minimalist Studio Flat
description: A compact, beautifully designed studio ideal for young professionals, featuring high-speed fibre and co-working lounge access.

title: Gated Estate Villa
description: An ultra-luxury island villa with Olympic-size pool, home cinema, staff quarters, and 24/7 concierge service.

title: Cozy 2-Bedroom Apartment
description: A well-maintained mid-rise apartment in a quiet neighbourhood, close to schools, hospitals, and markets.

title: Colonial Heritage Mansion
description: A grand colonial-style mansion with arched verandas, mature tropical gardens, and a detached guest chalet.

title: New-Build Semi-Detached
description: A freshly completed semi-detached home in a fast-growing estate corridor, with solar backup and prepaid meters.

title: Highrise Luxury Apartment
description: Premium floor-to-ceiling glass apartment in Lagos' newest city district, with ocean frontage and concierge gym.

title: Garden Court Maisonette
description: A charming split-level maisonette surrounded by flowering hedges, with a private courtyard and children's play area.

title: Industrial Loft Apartment
description: A converted warehouse loft with exposed brick, polished concrete floors, and dramatic double-height ceilings.

title: Eco-Friendly Detached Home
description: A sustainably built home with rainwater harvesting, solar panels, composting garden, and natural ventilation design.

title: Serviced Corporate Apartment
description: A fully serviced executive apartment with housekeeping, gym, pool, and 24-hour power — perfect for short-let or corporate lease.

title: Beachfront Retreat Cottage
description: A rare island-access beach cottage with direct sand frontage, open-deck dining, and a private boat dock.
